name: TimeGrid
description: Captures time value from the user with a predefined set of options
searchText: timegrid captures time value from the user with a predefined set of options @mantine/dates /dates/time-grid allowdeselect ampmlabels data defaultvalue disabletime disabled format getcontrolprops maxtime mintime onchange radius simplegridprops size value withseconds

props.name: allowDeselect
props.description: Determines whether the value can be deselected when the current active option is clicked or activated with keyboard

props.name: data
props.description: Time data in 24h format to be displayed in the grid, for example ['10:00', '18:30', '22:00']. Time values must be unique.

props.name: disableTime
props.description: Array of time values to disable

props.name: disabled
props.description: If set, all controls are disabled

props.name: format
props.description: Time format displayed in the grid

props.name: getControlProps
props.description: A function to pass props down to control based on the time value

props.name: maxTime
props.description: All controls after this time are disabled

props.name: minTime
props.description: All controls before this time are disabled

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: simpleGridProps
props.description: Props passed down to the underlying SimpleGrid component

props.name: size
props.description: Control font-size of controls, key of theme.fontSizes or any valid CSS value

props.name: withSeconds
props.description: Determines whether the seconds part should be displayed
